content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement pipeline by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine framework that preserves Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervision while addressing its blind spot of feedback bias from a single perspective. This framework lets an LLM criticize its own output from divergent problem-solving viewpoints one at a time in iterative refinement, rather than only judging from its original single framing of the task.
